subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-11 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: We went for a short drive and walked through the Sutro Gardens, which are very beautiful. San Francisco has capacity - capacity for many things
subcodes.subjects: @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @prophecy and fulfillment, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
